hero.heading: Building Intelligent
hero.description: ADT SoftTech is an AI and software development company specializing in data analytics, automation, and intelligent systems that help startups, individuals, SMEs, and enterprises scale and innovate.

items.title: Our Mission
items.description: To build intelligent software systems using AI, data analytics, and automation that help businesses make smarter decisions and scale efficiently.

items.title: Our Vision
items.description: To become a global leader in AI-powered digital transformation, enabling startups, enterprises, and small businesses to grow through digital systems, data, and automation.

items.title: Why ADT
items.description: Analytics, Development, and Transformation come together in every solution: clear data, reliable engineering, and measurable business improvement.

founders.sectionSubtitle: The technical minds behind ADT SoftTech.

items.name: Rana Muhammad Tehseen
items.subtitle: AI Systems ? Data Analytics ? Automation ? Business Intelligence
items.description: Leads product strategy, AI development, analytics systems, automation architecture, and decision-making solutions for ADT SoftTech clients.

items.name: Allah Ditta Saim
items.subtitle: Flutter ? Firebase ? Backend Systems ? API Integration
items.description: Leads technical architecture, app development, backend systems, API integration, and scalable mobile and web application delivery.
